lock_policy: Dated official pick files are append-only. Re-running the engine for the same date reuses the existing dated file instead of changing official picks.
note: Official picks require market edge, model probability >= 72%, Lab Rating >= 80, pitcher support, and no major bullpen caution.

labScoreBreakdown.note: Lab Rating grades setup quality. It is not win probability.

pick_team.label: Normal
pick_team.workload_read: Manageable recent workload. Bullpen should still be part of the full-game read.
pick_team.score_reason: Normal (61/100): 11 relief innings over the last three days, 1 arm pitched back-to-back days, and the pen was hit hard for 6 runs in that stretch. 10 reliever appearances in the window.
pick_team.formula: 45 + ((Last 3 BP IP - 9) x 3.5) + ((Last game BP IP - 3) x 4) + (Back-to-back arms x 6) + clamp((Last 3 BP runs - 4) x 1.5, -6, 12)

context_only.note: Reliever counts are displayed for context only and do not add score points.

opponent.label: Tired
opponent.workload_read: Elevated recent workload. Full-game angles deserve extra late-inning caution.
opponent.score_reason: Tired (78/100): 13 relief innings over the last three days, 3 arms pitched back-to-back days, allowing 3 runs. 12 reliever appearances in the window.
opponent.formula: 45 + ((Last 3 BP IP - 9) x 3.5) + ((Last game BP IP - 3) x 4) + (Back-to-back arms x 6) + clamp((Last 3 BP runs - 4) x 1.5, -6, 12)

context_only.note: Reliever counts are displayed for context only and do not add score points.

moneyline.why: Minnesota Twins is an official moneyline pick because it clears both gates: 78.6% model win probability and 9.1/10 Lab Rating. LyDia projects 78.6% against a 62.1% no-vig market number, a 16.5% model edge at -177. Minnesota Twins owns the starting pitcher edge by 45 points. Bullpen read: Supports LyDia side.
moneyline.risk: No model can see every live lineup, injury, or late bullpen availability update. Recheck official news before first pitch.
